title: Data Model Naming
description: Describing the naming conventions for entities in the Madalier visualization.

naming_convention.description: Configurable code describing naming convention for how business names will be translated to technical names. Options: [lower_snake_case, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE, Proper_Snake_Case, lower-kebab-case, UPPER-KEBAB-CASE, Proper-Kebab-Case, camelCase, PascalCase]

word_mappings.description: Array containing mappings of words to their technical abbreviations.

items.description: Mapping of a word to its technical abbreviation.

business_name.description: The business name that needs to be translated.

technical_abbreviation.description: The technical abbreviation for the business name.
